full_text:
Zhu Zhi (Junli) 朱治 (君理)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Zhi (朱治), styledJunli (君理), was born in Gu Zhang County, Dan Yang (Presently Nan Jing County, Jiang Su Province). Served through three generations of the Sun family. Magistrate in Wu County. Zhu Zhi was affiliated with Yuan Shu, Xu Gong, and the Wu Kingdom. Zhu Zhi lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
